mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, storage_location_no, logical_plant_id, location_type, description, storage_location_position, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
select
from storage_location where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0

select
from storage_location where logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId} and deleted = 0 order by create_time

select
from storage_location where logical_plant_id in #{item} and deleted = 0

select
from storage_location where id in #{item} and deleted = 0

select
from storage_location where storage_location_no = #{storageLocationNo} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into storage_location ( tenant_id, storage_location_no, logical_plant_id, location_type, description, storage_location_position, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values
(#{item.tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.storageLocationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.logicalPlantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{item.locationType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.storageLocationPosition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into storage_location (id, tenant_id, storage_location_no, logical_plant_id, location_type, description, storage_location_position, creator_id, updator_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageLocationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logicalPlantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{locationType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageLocationPosition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into storage_location
id,
tenant_id,
storage_location_no,
logical_plant_id,
location_type,
description,
storage_location_position,
creator_id,
updator_id,
create_time,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storageLocationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{logicalPlantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{locationType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{storageLocationPosition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update storage_location
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storage_location_no = #{storageLocationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
storage_location_position = #{storageLocationPosition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update storage_location set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storage_location_no = #{storageLocationNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logical_plant_id = #{logicalPlantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storage_location_position = #{storageLocationPosition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updator_id = #{updatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
